title: CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY SERVICES - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides evaluation, information and referral, prevention, and early intervention services for substance abuse disorder and/or alcohol use disorder. Offers outpatient and intensive outpatient treatment. 627 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6:30pm (503) 434-7527 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 434-7527 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance cards if applicable, proof of income for sliding scale LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Perinatal Substance Use Disorder Treatment Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ABACUS FOR YOUTH AND ADULTS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YAMHILL COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
